notes: All development done locally using wrangler dev before any production deployment. Auth via Better Auth (OAuth + magic link, no passwords stored).

phases.name: Project Foundation
phases.description: Project scaffolding, tooling, and local dev infrastructure

tasks.name: Initialise Nuxt 3 project
tasks.description: Scaffold Nuxt 3 project with TypeScript, configure nuxt.config.ts with cloudflare-pages preset via Nitro

tasks.name: Configure Cloudflare bindings for local dev
tasks.description: Set up wrangler.toml with D1 database binding, KV namespace bindings (rate-limits), and Workers AI binding. All pointing to local dev resources

tasks.name: Install core dependencies
tasks.description: Install: nuxt-ui (component library), drizzle-orm + drizzle-kit (D1 ORM + migrations), better-auth + @better-auth/nuxt, chart.js, and dev tooling

tasks.name: Set up D1 database with Drizzle ORM
tasks.description: Define Drizzle schema, configure drizzle-kit for D1 migrations, create initial migration. Run locally with wrangler d1

tasks.name: Create base layout and app shell
tasks.description: Header with nav (Home, Pollies, Leaderboard, Login), footer, responsive mobile layout, dark/light mode toggle

tasks.name: Verify local dev environment end-to-end
tasks.description: Confirm Nuxt dev server works with local D1, KV, and AI bindings via wrangler dev. Ensure hot reload works. Document local dev setup in README

phases.name: Database Schema & Seed Data
phases.description: Define all tables, seed with real Australian political data locally

tasks.name: Create database schema - Better Auth tables
tasks.description: Drizzle schema for Better Auth managed tables: user, session, account, verification. These are created/managed by Better Auth but defined in Drizzle for type safety

tasks.name: Create database schema - app tables
tasks.description: Drizzle schema for: user_profiles, electorates, politicians, sources, rss_feeds, stories, story_clusters, story_politicians, votes, polly_daily_stats, admin_log. Apply migration to local D1

tasks.name: Create indexes
tasks.description: Add indexes: votes(user_id, cluster_id) unique, stories(url_hash) unique, stories(status, submitted_at), story_politicians(politician_id), polly_daily_stats(politician_id, date), user_profiles(user_id) unique

tasks.name: Seed electorates data
tasks.description: Source all 151 federal electorates from AEC data with state/territory mapping. Create seed script that runs against local D1

tasks.name: Seed politicians data
tasks.description: Source current federal MPs and Senators from APH/OpenAustralia. Include: name, party, chamber, electorate/state, photo URL. Create seed script

tasks.name: Seed news sources and RSS feeds
tasks.description: Create seed data for Tier 1 sources (domain, name, tier) and their RSS feed URLs (ABC Politics, Guardian AU, SMH Federal, SBS Politics, The Conversation, etc.) with poll intervals

phases.name: Authentication System
phases.description: Better Auth setup with OAuth and magic link, no passwords stored

tasks.name: Configure Better Auth server
tasks.description: Set up Better Auth in server/auth.ts with D1 database adapter via Drizzle. Configure session handling. Set up the auth API handler at server/api/auth/[...all].ts

tasks.name: Configure OAuth providers
tasks.description: Set up Google OAuth provider in Better Auth config. Set up Apple OAuth provider. Configure callback URLs for local dev. Store client IDs/secrets in .env (local) and wrangler secrets (prod)

tasks.name: Configure magic link provider
tasks.description: Set up email magic link in Better Auth. Integrate Resend for email delivery. Configure magic link template. Test locally with Resend test mode or console logging

tasks.name: Build login/register page
tasks.description: Single auth page with: Google sign-in button, Apple sign-in button, email input for magic link. Cloudflare Turnstile widget. No password fields anywhere

tasks.name: Build onboarding flow
tasks.description: After first OAuth/magic link sign-in, redirect to onboarding page: age declaration checkbox (must be 18+), electorate searchable dropdown. Creates user_profiles record. Flag onboarding_complete=true. Subsequent logins skip onboarding

tasks.name: Build auth middleware
tasks.description: Nuxt server middleware to populate user context from Better Auth session on all requests. Composable useAuth() for client-side auth state. Protected route middleware for pages requiring auth

tasks.name: Build user settings page
tasks.description: Page to change electorate, view linked OAuth accounts, delete account (soft-delete retains anonymised vote data). Protected route

tasks.name: Integrate Cloudflare Turnstile
tasks.description: Add Turnstile widget to auth page. Verify token server-side before allowing sign-in/registration. Prevents bot account creation

tasks.name: Test auth flows locally end-to-end
tasks.description: Verify: Google OAuth flow, magic link flow, onboarding, session persistence, logout, settings page. All against local D1

phases.name: RSS Ingestion Pipeline
phases.description: Automated story ingestion from news RSS feeds

tasks.name: Build RSS feed parser
tasks.description: Server utility to fetch and parse RSS/Atom feeds. Extract: article URL, title, published date, GUID. Handle various feed formats (RSS 2.0, Atom, etc.)

tasks.name: Build metadata fetcher
tasks.description: Server utility to fetch a URL and extract OpenGraph metadata: og:title, og:description, og:image, article:published_time. Fallback to meta tags and JSON-LD. Handle paywalled/blocked pages gracefully

tasks.name: Build AI relevance filter
tasks.description: Using Workers AI, classify whether an article is about Australian federal politics. Prompt with headline + description, return boolean. Discard non-political articles. Test locally with wrangler AI bindings

tasks.name: Build AI politician extractor
tasks.description: Using Workers AI, extract politician names mentioned in article headline + description. Match against polly database (fuzzy match on name/display_name). Return list of politician IDs

tasks.name: Build story creation service
tasks.description: Server service that takes a URL, fetches metadata, checks for URL dedup, runs AI relevance filter, extracts pollies, creates story + story_politicians records. Used by both RSS ingestion and user submission

tasks.name: Build RSS cron worker
tasks.description: Cloudflare Cron Trigger that runs every 15 minutes. Iterates active RSS feeds, fetches new articles since last poll, runs each through story creation service. Updates last_polled_at and last_article_guid. Implements error backoff. Test locally with wrangler dev --test-scheduled

tasks.name: Build RSS feed admin management API
tasks.description: CRUD endpoints for RSS feeds: list, add, edit, pause/resume, delete. Used by admin panel

tasks.name: Test RSS pipeline locally end-to-end
tasks.description: Trigger cron manually, verify: feeds polled, articles fetched, AI filters applied, stories created with polly links, duplicates rejected. All against local D1

phases.name: Story Display & User Submission
phases.description: Story cards, feed pages, and user story submission

tasks.name: Build story card component
tasks.description: Vue component showing: thumbnail, headline, source name, published date, linked polly names/photos, vote counts (pass/fail bar), vote buttons. Compact and scannable

tasks.name: Build feed API endpoint
tasks.description: GET /api/stories - returns paginated stories sorted by hot score. Accept params: sort (hot/new/most-voted), filter (party/chamber/state/electorate), page, limit. Hot score: log10(votes) + (age_hours / -decay_factor)

tasks.name: Build home feed page
tasks.description: Main page showing story cards from feed API. Sort toggle (Hot/New/Most Voted). Filter sidebar/dropdown. Infinite scroll or pagination. Highlight stories for user's local MP and state senators

tasks.name: Build user story submission flow
tasks.description: Submit page: URL input field. On submit, call API that fetches metadata, shows preview (headline, thumbnail, source), shows AI-suggested polly links with ability to adjust. Confirm to publish. Rate limited to 10/day, blocked for accounts < 48hrs old

tasks.name: Build story detail page
tasks.description: Full story view: headline, description, thumbnail, source link, published date, all linked pollies with photos, full vote tally, vote buttons. If part of a cluster, show all source articles

tasks.name: Build vote API endpoints
tasks.description: POST /api/votes - cast or change vote (user_id, cluster_id, vote). DELETE /api/votes - remove vote. Server-side enforcement of one vote per user per story via unique constraint. Record ip_hash with vote

tasks.name: Build vote UI interaction
tasks.description: Pass/Fail buttons on story cards and detail page. Optimistic UI update. Show current user's vote state (highlighted button). Require auth — prompt login if not authenticated

tasks.name: Build vote aggregation queries
tasks.description: Efficient queries for: total pass/fail per story, per polly (across all linked stories), pass percentage. Consider caching aggregates in KV for hot stories

tasks.name: Implement vote rate limiting
tasks.description: Max 50 votes per hour per account via KV counter. New accounts (< 24hrs): max 10 votes. Return 429 with retry-after header when exceeded

phases.name: Politician Pages & Leaderboard
phases.description: Polly profiles, approval ratings, and rankings

tasks.name: Build polly profile page
tasks.description: Page at /polly/[id]: photo, name, party, electorate/state, chamber. Overall approval percentage (big, prominent). List of linked stories with vote tallies, sorted by recency. Filterable by time period

tasks.name: Build polly listing page
tasks.description: Page at /pollies: grid/list of all politicians with photos, names, party, approval rating. Filterable by party, chamber, state. Searchable by name

tasks.name: Build leaderboard page
tasks.description: Page at /leaderboard: ranked list of pollies by approval rating. Tabs: highest approval, lowest approval. Filterable by party, chamber, state. Show rank, photo, name, party, approval %

tasks.name: Build polly approval aggregation
tasks.description: API endpoint GET /api/politicians/[id]/approval - returns current approval %, total votes. Aggregates across all linked story clusters. Cache result in KV with short TTL

tasks.name: Create electorate hex cartogram layout
tasks.description: Build a hex cartogram data file mapping each of 151 electorates to a hex grid position (col, row) placed roughly by geographic location. One hex per seat gives equal visual weight. Fall back to AEC GeoJSON boundary map if hex layout proves too complex

tasks.name: Build electorate heatmap component
tasks.description: Interactive hex cartogram (or GeoJSON fallback) coloured by MP approval rating. Green=high, red=low. Hover shows electorate name, MP, party, approval %. Click navigates to polly profile. SVG-based for lightweight rendering

tasks.name: Build heatmap API endpoint
tasks.description: GET /api/heatmap - returns array of { electorateId, electorateName, politicianId, politicianName, party, approvalPct } for all current House members. Cache in KV

tasks.name: Add heatmap to leaderboard or dedicated page
tasks.description: Integrate electorate heatmap into leaderboard page or create /map page. Responsive for mobile (zoomable/scrollable). Legend showing approval colour scale

tasks.name: Implement IP-based account creation rate limiting
tasks.description: KV counter per IP hash: max 3 accounts per 24hrs. Return 429 on excess. Better Auth hook to check before account creation

tasks.name: Implement new account restrictions
tasks.description: Server middleware checks account age via user_profiles.created_at. < 24hrs: max 10 votes/day. < 48hrs: cannot submit stories. Enforced at API level

tasks.name: Implement story submission rate limiting
tasks.description: KV counter per user: max 10 submissions per 24hrs

tasks.name: Implement IP tracking on votes
tasks.description: Store hashed IP with each vote. Build query to detect anomalous IP clusters (many votes from same IP across different accounts)

tasks.name: Implement disposable email blocking
tasks.description: For magic link auth: block disposable email domains. Maintain blocklist of known disposable providers. Check on magic link request

phases.name: Admin Panel
phases.description: Minimal admin interface for solo moderation

tasks.name: Build admin route protection
tasks.description: Server middleware protecting /admin/* routes. Checks is_admin flag on user_profiles. Reuses Better Auth session — no separate admin login

tasks.name: Build story moderation queue
tasks.description: Admin page showing Tier 3 stories pending moderation. Approve/reject buttons. Show story metadata and source domain

tasks.name: Build source management page
tasks.description: Admin page to list all sources, add new source, change tier, toggle active/inactive. Manage RSS feeds per source (add/edit/pause/delete feeds)

tasks.name: Build politician management page
tasks.description: Admin page to list/edit/add/deactivate politicians. Edit name, party, electorate, photo URL, status

tasks.name: Build user management page
tasks.description: Admin page to list users, view account details (electorate, created date, vote count, linked OAuth providers), ban/suspend accounts

tasks.name: Build basic analytics dashboard
tasks.description: Admin page showing: stories ingested today, votes today, new registrations today, active RSS feeds, feed error count. Simple counters

phases.name: Local Testing & Polish
phases.description: Comprehensive local testing before any production deployment

tasks.name: Full integration test locally
tasks.description: End-to-end walkthrough of all user flows locally: register, onboard, browse feed, vote, view polly profiles, submit story, admin moderation. Fix any issues

tasks.name: Mobile responsiveness testing
tasks.description: Test all pages at mobile breakpoints. Fix layout issues. Ensure vote buttons are tap-friendly

tasks.name: SEO and meta tags
tasks.description: Add appropriate meta tags, OpenGraph tags for sharing polly profiles and stories on social media. Nuxt SEO composables

tasks.name: Error handling and edge cases
tasks.description: Handle: failed RSS fetches gracefully, OAuth errors, rate limit UX (show friendly message), empty states (no stories yet, no votes yet), 404 pages

tasks.name: Create terms of service and privacy policy pages
tasks.description: Static pages with ToS (votes are opinion, no manipulation) and privacy policy (Australian Privacy Act compliant, data collected, no data sold)

tasks.name: Set up Cloudflare account and resources
tasks.description: Create Cloudflare account (if needed). Create D1 database (production), KV namespaces (rate-limits). Enable Workers AI

tasks.name: Configure production secrets
tasks.description: Set secrets via wrangler: Google OAuth client ID/secret, Apple OAuth client ID/secret, Resend API key, Turnstile secret key, Better Auth secret

tasks.name: Run production database migrations and seed
tasks.description: Apply Drizzle migrations to production D1. Run seed scripts for electorates, politicians, sources, RSS feeds

tasks.name: Deploy to Cloudflare Pages
tasks.description: Connect git repo to Cloudflare Pages or deploy via wrangler pages deploy. Configure build command and output directory. Verify deployment

tasks.name: Configure custom domain
tasks.description: Register domain (pubtest.com.au or similar). Point DNS to Cloudflare Pages. Configure SSL. Update OAuth callback URLs to production domain

tasks.name: Smoke test production
tasks.description: Verify: OAuth login, onboarding, RSS ingestion running, stories appearing, voting works, polly pages load, admin panel accessible

tasks.name: Create admin account
tasks.description: Login via OAuth, manually set is_admin=true on user_profiles record in production D1

tasks.name: Build story embedding generation
tasks.description: On story creation, generate text embedding of headline+description via Workers AI. Store embedding in stories table or separate table

tasks.name: Build clustering service
tasks.description: Compare new story embedding against recent stories (cosine similarity). If similarity > threshold, assign to existing cluster. Otherwise create new cluster

tasks.name: Build cluster UI
tasks.description: Story cards show cluster badge if multiple sources. Expandable to see all articles in cluster. Votes shown at cluster level

phases.name: Post-MVP: Historical Trends
phases.description: Time-series tracking of polly approval ratings

tasks.name: Build daily stats snapshot cron
tasks.description: Cloudflare Cron Trigger running once daily. For each politician, calculate current approval %, total votes, pass/fail counts. Insert into polly_daily_stats

tasks.name: Build trend API endpoint
tasks.description: GET /api/politicians/[id]/trend?period=30d - returns time series of daily approval data. Support 30d, 90d, 1y, all periods

tasks.name: Build trend chart component
tasks.description: Chart.js line graph on polly profile page. X-axis: dates, Y-axis: approval %. Selectable time range. Responsive

tasks.name: Build leaderboard movers
tasks.description: Add 'most improved' and 'biggest drop' sections to leaderboard. Compare current approval to 30 days ago

tasks.name: Build party aggregate trends
tasks.description: Average approval per party over time. Party-level trend chart. 'Parliament mood' overall trend

tasks.name: Build IP cluster detection
tasks.description: Scheduled job to identify accounts sharing IPs that vote in similar patterns. Flag for admin review

tasks.name: Build voting pattern analysis
tasks.description: Detect accounts that vote in lockstep (same votes on same stories within short timeframes). Flag suspicious accounts

tasks.name: Build admin fraud dashboard
tasks.description: Admin page showing flagged accounts, IP clusters, suspicious voting patterns. Bulk ban and bulk vote reversal tools
